drift._comment: A1 drift-gauge fixed points (BUILD-SPEC §15, gap G4). Owner-blessed, frozen, never auto-modified (Invariant 9) and excluded from the self-mod lever set. Per-axis *_tol values are one 'tolerance-unit' of deterioration on that axis; drift_tolerance is Theta (the blessed band — calibrate against observed curves with the F4 harness, then re-bless here). constitution_fingerprint is the frozen-anchor Constitution identity (sha256 of CONSTITUTION.md); re-bless it AND re-run the golden set whenever CONSTITUTION.md is deliberately amended.
